products.name: Bedsure Satin Pillowcase Set
products.tagline: Silky pillowcases she'll actually use every night
products.what_it_is: A 2-pack of satin pillowcases that reduce hair frizz and skin creasing during sleep.
products.best_for: Moms who care about sleep quality, hair health, or just appreciate soft textures.
products.stands_out: One of the most universally liked "treat yourself" gifts — she probably won't buy it herself.
products.before_you_buy: Check her pillow size (standard, queen, king) before ordering.
products.skip_if: She's already set up with premium bedding or you want something more personal.

products.name: Ember Mug 2 (14 oz)
products.tagline: Keeps coffee or tea at her preferred temperature for hours
products.what_it_is: A battery-powered ceramic mug that holds a set temperature via Bluetooth app.
products.best_for: Moms who always let their coffee go cold or work at a desk.
products.stands_out: Genuinely solves a real daily annoyance — the app lets her set the exact temp she likes.
products.before_you_buy: It requires charging and occasional app pairing; not everyone wants that friction.
products.skip_if: She prefers simplicity or rarely drinks hot beverages.

products.name: Perfect Blank Recipe Book (Hardcover)
products.tagline: A keepsake recipe journal to preserve family recipes
products.what_it_is: A hardcover blank recipe journal with organized sections for ingredients, instructions, and notes.
products.best_for: Moms who cook, bake, or want to preserve family food traditions.
products.stands_out: Adds a personal touch — she can fill it with handwritten family recipes to pass down.
products.before_you_buy: This is a blank journal, not pre-filled; works best as a thoughtful gift with personal context.
products.skip_if: She doesn't cook or already has a recipe system she loves.
